cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a skin-management store around blackheads and acne-mark consultation using trust-first messaging and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: consult-first route, no medical cure claims, clear suitability framing
input.audience_segment: local users dealing with visible blackheads, congestion, and acne-mark concerns

mustInclude: trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects concern and booking window

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a pre-event skin-state consult route
input.offer_info: event-window consult route, no exaggerated promise

cases.label: long_term_case

input.strategy_route: Write a soft re-engagement message for existing skin-management clients approaching a revisit or maintenance point
input.offer_info: maintenance reminder based on timing and current state
input.audience_segment: past clients who completed an earlier visit and may now be ready for a revisit

mustInclude: CTA tied to timing or current state

input.strategy_route: Rewrite a skin-management promo that currently overuses before-after claims and absolute efficacy wording
